LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION. THE COURT RULES AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. calendar.matters:
HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Apr-05-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF CACH, LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.

Appearances: Vivan Lerche (415.680.5751) specially appearing for plaintiff and moving party; Lester Ibarra , defendant appearing in propria persona with Linda Ibarra.

Discussed and the Court rules as follows: defendant's claim of exemption is granted. Any funds held by the levying officer are directed to be released to defendant. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Reporter: Kelley DeYoung, CSR 6780 (kdeyoung@sftc.org) (302/HEK)

HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
Off Calendar Mar-28-2017 Continued To Apr-05-17 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lester Ibarra, in pro per, Tel. 415.601.9011, for judgment debtor;
Vivian Leung Lerche, Attorney at Law, Tel. 415.680.5731, for judgment creditor CACH, LLC;
also appearing: Linda Ibarra, Tel. 415.601.9011, appearing with judgment debtor.

Ruling: The matter was discussed. The judgment debtor, Lester Ibarra's HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is continued to April 5, 2017, at 9:30 a.m., in Dept. 302, to allow the judgment creditor the opportunity to review documents provided by the judgment debtor in court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.
